case_title: MASTER ASHLEY J.L. RHODES VS. SHAOQING ZHANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2017 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RHODES, MASTER ASHLEY J.L. AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, SHAOQING

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-06-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MASTER ASHLEY RHODES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHAQING ZHANG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RHODES, MASTER ASHLEY J.L. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ZHANG, SHAOQING STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-23-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZHANG, SHAOQING
